mapper.insert: insert into order_detail (id, name, image, order_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount) VALUES (#{id},#{name},#{image},#{orderId},#{dishId},#{setmealId},#{dishFlavor},#{number},#{amount});
mapper.select: select * from order_detail where order_id=#{orderId} order by id;
